description_long: This is a young adult male with a modern urban streetwear style, featuring a loose short-sleeve shirt adorned with gold chains and a large graphic on the back. He wears a patterned bandana covering the lower half of his face, and his arms are decorated with visible tattoos. His pants are slim-fit with patchwork details and a bandana hanging from the waistband, paired with white sneakers. The figure's hair is styled in a voluminous, spiked fashion, and he wears fingerless gloves. The overall appearance suggests a confident, fashion-forward individual, likely blending into a contemporary city environment.
description: A stylish urban male in streetwear with a bandana mask, gold chains, tattoos, and spiked hair, dressed in a loose shirt, patchwork pants, and sneakers.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bandana mask, gold chains, tattoos, fingerless gloves, and the full design of the shirt and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the spiked hairstyle, arm tattoos, and the slim profile of the pants and sneakers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large graphic on the back of the shirt, the bandana hanging from the waistband, and the overall silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the arm tattoos, glove details, and the layered look of the pants and accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: urban streetwear with a loose short-sleeve shirt, slim-fit patchwork pants, fingerless gloves, and a face bandana
